attributes.name: [SQL Server OTel] TempDB version store large

esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-default
// Version store growth can exhaust TempDB; affects snapshot isolation, sorts, spills
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.database.tempdb.version_store.size IS NOT NULL
| STATS max_version_store_kb = MAX(metrics.sqlserver.database.tempdb.version_store.size),
       instance_id = MAX(resource.attributes.service.instance.id)
  BY COALESCE(resource.attributes.service.instance.id, host.name, "unknown")
// Alert when version store exceeds 1GB (1048576 KB); adjust for your TempDB capacity
| WHERE max_version_store_kb > 1048576
| KEEP instance_id, max_version_store_kb
